decision.label: Preview Handoff Index
decision.reason: This index organizes the Detroit Dynamo launch artifacts for owner review without approving launch or unlocking live actions.

items.title: Rebrand Audit and Roadmap
items.purpose: Primary summary of audit, implementation, remaining needs, testing, and next steps.
items.launchQuestion: Does the handoff explain what was built, what remains external, and how it was verified?

items.title: Goal Audit Report
items.purpose: Machine-readable 7/8 implemented-scope audit with the remaining external gate visible.
items.launchQuestion: Do implemented requirements still pass while external gates remain explicit?

items.title: Final Acceptance Matrix
items.purpose: Requirement-by-requirement acceptance ledger separating preview-complete rows from external evidence required rows.
items.launchQuestion: Does every original acceptance requirement have evidence and explicit remaining external gates?

items.title: Owner Launch Review Packet
items.purpose: No-go decision packet for owner review across backend, payments, waivers, facts, SEO, redirects, and monitoring.
items.launchQuestion: Has the owner reviewed every go/no-go launch section?

items.title: Owner Handoff Packet
items.purpose: Single owner-meeting packet that consolidates redaction status, proof artifacts, verification commands, signoff state, and blocked live actions.
items.launchQuestion: Does the owner have one redacted packet tying artifacts, commands, signoffs, evidence, and blocked live actions together?

items.title: External Gate Closure Packet
items.purpose: Ordered closure rows for backend, payments, waivers, league/facility facts, proof publication, deployment, cutover, and final signoff evidence.
items.launchQuestion: Does every remaining external gate have a role owner, required evidence, verification command, and blocked live action?

items.title: Owner Evidence Intake Worksheet
items.purpose: Fillable rows for proof location, approver, approval date, decision, and notes.
items.launchQuestion: Has every evidence item been given a real location, approver, date, and decision?

items.title: Owner Signoff Register
items.purpose: Unsigned owner/external approval rows for final launch decisions across backend, deployment, payments, waivers, facts, content, SEO, redirects, and rollback.
items.launchQuestion: Are all owner and external approvals still unsigned until real evidence is attached?

items.title: Vercel Preview Deployment Runbook
items.purpose: Redacted Vercel CLI, preview deployment, inspect, QA, promotion-hold, and rollback command plan.
items.launchQuestion: Has a Vercel preview URL, deployment id, route QA, inspect summary, and rollback target been recorded without exposing secrets?

items.title: Secret Redaction Contract
items.purpose: Share-safety checklist and scanner for generated handoffs, source files, Vercel identifiers, and local provider secrets.
items.launchQuestion: Do generated handoffs and source files avoid local secret values and Vercel project identifiers?

items.title: Production Preview Evidence Matrix
items.purpose: Production-preview proof checklist for public forms, admin functions, route QA, backend activation, and confirmations.
items.launchQuestion: Have production-preview submissions and admin action proofs been attached?

items.title: Live Readiness Board
items.purpose: Final no-go/go phase board before any root, checkout, signature, redirect, or publication action.
items.launchQuestion: Is every launch phase still blocked until real evidence and owner approval exist?

items.title: Deployment Readiness Handoff
items.purpose: Hosting, environment, production-preview, domain, indexing, redirect, and rollback evidence required before root promotion.
items.launchQuestion: Are deployment ids, preview URLs, env evidence, and rollback targets recorded before promotion?

items.title: Launch Evidence Checklist
items.purpose: Required proof list for site preservation, backend, payments, waivers, facts, SEO, redirects, and post-launch QA.
items.launchQuestion: Are all required proof items known and assigned?

items.title: Launch Evidence Action Handoff
items.purpose: Preview-only ledger action model for attaching proof, requesting review, and requesting changes.
items.launchQuestion: Can operators record preview proof actions without clearing live gates?

items.title: External Confirmation Register
items.purpose: Required facts and publish rules for payments, waivers, league/facility facts, staff, rosters, sponsors, media, and SEO.
items.launchQuestion: Which external facts are still unconfirmed?

items.title: External Confirmation Action Handoff
items.purpose: Preview-only approval routing model that cannot unlock publication or clear live gates.
items.launchQuestion: Can owner signoff requests be rehearsed without publishing facts?

items.title: Payment and Waiver Gate Contract
items.purpose: Payment/package and waiver/legal readiness tracks with publish modes and approval needs.
items.launchQuestion: Are checkout and waiver workflows still gated until owner/legal approval?

items.title: Public Claim Safety Contract
items.purpose: Claim guardrails for league, facility, roster, staff, sponsor, testimonial, media, and outcome proof.
items.launchQuestion: Are unconfirmed claims still future-pathway or placeholder language?

items.title: Safeguarding and Privacy Contract
items.purpose: Youth, guardian, staff, medical, waiver, media, roster, retention, export, deletion, and audit controls.
items.launchQuestion: Are youth-facing operations still blocked until safeguarding evidence is approved?

items.title: Backend Activation Runbook
items.purpose: Ordered Appwrite preflight, schema, provisioning, function, intake, and promotion-gate steps.
items.launchQuestion: What must happen before live Appwrite mode is enabled?

items.title: Lead Intake Function Handoff
items.purpose: Function contract and fixtures for all public lead form variants.
items.launchQuestion: Do public forms map to the expected dd_* records?

items.title: Pipeline Action Function Handoff
items.purpose: Authenticated status transition fixtures and rejection cases.
items.launchQuestion: Are pipeline transitions scoped and auditable?

items.title: Admin Module Read Handoff
items.purpose: Authenticated module read fixtures, scopes, and rejection cases.
items.launchQuestion: Are admin reads role-scoped before live data browsing?

items.title: Admin Module Write Handoff
items.purpose: Authenticated create/update/archive fixtures and rejection cases for future admin writes.
items.launchQuestion: Are live admin writes still blocked until external gates and roles are approved?

items.title: Admin Role Grant Handoff
items.purpose: Master Admin role grant bootstrap and role assignment action contract.
items.launchQuestion: Can trusted roles be granted without opening broad admin access?

items.title: Admin Record Workspace Handoff
items.purpose: Preview record workspace and CSV export planning for module detail pages.
items.launchQuestion: Are preview record workspaces ready without mutating live records?

items.title: Promotion Cutover Control
items.purpose: Root route, metadata, noindex, redirect, legal/support, booking/payment/waiver, and rollback controls.
items.launchQuestion: What remains blocked before Detroit Dynamo can replace the LC root?

items.title: Redirect Plan Draft
items.purpose: Draft redirect timing for old LC routes into future Detroit Dynamo routes.
items.launchQuestion: Which redirects must wait for promotion approval?

items.title: Sitemap Preview
items.purpose: Sitemap-ready Detroit Dynamo preview routes.
items.launchQuestion: Which Dynamo routes are sitemap-ready after SEO approval?

items.title: Browser QA Report
items.purpose: Rendered route, form, button, link, console, and protected admin QA evidence.
items.launchQuestion: Do desktop/mobile routes, public forms, and protected admin pages render cleanly?

usageRules: Start with the Live Readiness Board, then the Owner Launch Review Packet, then the Owner Evidence Intake Worksheet.
Do not treat any index item as launch approval; it only points to the artifact that must be reviewed.
Keep preview-only counters at zero until real external evidence and owner approval are attached.
Run the artifact-specific verify command after updating any handoff file.
